description: Fix the main menu layout: remove crossed-katanas decoration and restore game mode buttons to horizontal (row) layout instead of column.
steps:
1. In src/components/MainMenu.tsx, delete the entire `
...
` block (the SVG with crossed katanas between the header and buttons).
2. In src/App.css, remove the CSS rule `.crossed-katanas-decoration{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0.8}` on line 140.

3. In src/App.css, remove the overriding CSS rule `.menu-options{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}` on line 141. The first definition on line 1 already has `display:flex;gap:2rem;margin-bottom:3rem` which gives the correct horizontal (row) layout by default.
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
The crossed-katanas SVG decoration is completely removed from MainMenu.tsx
The .menu-options container uses flex-direction: row (the default for flexbox) so mode buttons appear side by side
The .crossed-katanas-decoration CSS class is removed from App.css
The overriding .menu-options rule with flex-direction:column is removed from App.css
verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in the project root and confirm zero errors
findings: Removed the crossed-katanas SVG decoration div and its CSS rule, plus removed the .menu-options override that forced flex-direction:column. The original .menu-options definition on line 1 already provides display:flex with row layout. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
